title: Dice, Domino & Mahjong Symbols: Copy & Paste ⚀ ⚁ 🀄 Game Tiles
meta_description: Copy and paste dice, domino, and mahjong symbols — all six die faces, domino tiles, and mahjong tiles. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: Every die face plus domino and mahjong tiles, ready to copy. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
intro: Game tiles have their own Unicode blocks. This library gathers all six dice faces, a set of domino tiles, and the mahjong tiles for dragons, winds, and suits — all plain Unicode characters you can copy into game notes, posts, and chats.

sections.label: Dice
sections.intro: The six faces of a standard die, from one to six pips.

sections.label: Dominoes
sections.intro: Horizontal domino tiles, including the tile back.

sections.label: Mahjong
sections.intro: Dragons, winds, and the first tile of each mahjong suit.

related.title: Card Suit Symbols
related.desc: Spades, hearts, diamonds, and clubs plus playing card characters.

related.title: Chess Symbols
related.desc: Chess pieces in black and white to copy and paste.

related.title: Geometric Symbols
related.desc: Triangles, squares, circles, and other geometric shapes in Unicode.
